name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: BEN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$10.5050, stop A$10.0980, target A$11.5879 (2.66:1) — then trail it.
